concept.domains: (topic concept) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c concept oceConcept-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
concept.title: Logging a second visit

abstract.p: It can happen that a service visit cannot be completed, for example due to missing parts or lack of time. If a service visit is a follow-up on an earlier visit, it can be logged as a second visit. This functionality is available in ADAM version 1.4.0 and higher.

section.title: Example Second visit screens
section.p: Second visit is a category in the Main reason section of the Collect screen.
Second visit generates a pop-up screen that shows the last 5 visits from the device logbook.

note.p: A Second visit is always related to one or more previous visits and one or more reasons within these visits.

section.p: Select the related previous visit and press "Add". The main reason and the description will be filled out based on the selection.

A Second visit to continue an Installation is also related to one or more previous (installation) visits. In case of a partial previous installation visit, the next visit will automatically be a second visit.
Finish the service visit in ADAM. From this screen onwards, the process to complete the service visit is the same for an installation visit and any other issue.

section.title: Example History screen
section.p: The Second visit is indicated as the Main reason in the History category of the Analyze section.
Click on the date in the column "Following up on" to view the information of the earlier visit .
